title: Formula results as a percentage
excerpt: I am trying to calculate gross profit margins and ROI. How do I get my formula result to appear as a percentage and not a 0.273492 number?

posts.author: Noxolo (Noxolo Buthelezi)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to calculate gross profit margins and ROI. How do I get my formula result to appear as a percentage and not a 0.273492 number?

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

If you left click on summary of the group you get a popup where you select the way you would like to view the column, see screenshot below.

image986×307 21.9 KB

This only works for parent items. If you want to have this for subitems you will have to use the CONCATENATE function.

Hope this helps

posts.author: Noxolo (Noxolo Buthelezi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for your response.
I have tried that but it does not give the result of my formula as a percentage. Instead, it gives me the decimal number and adds the percentage to it at the end. Please see attached picture

So I would to see 64% as opposed to 0.64%

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Can you please share the formula you are using?

I think if you add “Multiply by 100” to your formula that would solve it.

posts.author: Noxolo (Noxolo Buthelezi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Joseph

You are absolutely right. I multiplied by 100 and it gave me exactly what I needed. Thank you so much.

Kind regards
